description: Canonical SwissTrip MCP — independent SBB/CFF/FFS schedules, prices, and ticket links by SwissTrip.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.Fabsbags/swisstrip-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional SwissTrip account token for cloud-synced traveler profiles. Mint at https://swisstrip.app/settings/developer.

environmentVariables.description: Override the hosted server URL. Default: https://mcp.swisstrip.app/mcp.
environmentVariables.name: SWISSTRIP_MCP_URL
